# Menace-I Brings Petabyte-Scale Processing to the Warfighter at the Tactical Edge

Menace-I is a turnkey command, control, compute, communications, cyber, and intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance (C5ISR) solution accredited for use as both a Sensitive Compartmented Information Facility (SCIF) and a Special Access Program Facility (SAPF).
